description: Buy a ticket, find your stop and get off at the right place

A.title: You got off at the right stop! 🎯
A.description: Direct bus, ticket stamped, right stop — you navigated Bratislava like a local.

B.title: You transferred and made it! 🎉
B.description: One transfer needed but you handled it perfectly. Two buses, one destination.

nodes.speaker: bus_driver
nodes.translation: Good day! Where are you going?
nodes.wrongAnswerResponse: Pomoc? Som len vodič... Tak — kam idete?
nodes.wrongAnswerTranslation: Help? I am just a driver... So — where are you going?

choices.text: Prosím si jednorazový lístok. Idem do centra.
choices.translation: A single ticket please. I'm going to the city centre.

choices.text: Idem na Hlavnú stanicu. Koľko to bude stáť?
choices.translation: I'm going to the Main Station. How much will it cost?
I don't know. I am from Germany.

nodes.speaker: bus_driver
nodes.text: Jeden lístok — jedno euro. Môžete platiť kartou.
nodes.translation: One ticket — one euro. You can pay by card.

nodes.speaker: bus_driver
nodes.text: Hlavná stanica? Tento autobus tam nejde priamo. Musíte prestupiť na zastávke Námestie SNP.
nodes.translation: Main Station? This bus doesn't go there directly. You need to transfer at Námestie SNP stop.

nodes.speaker: bus_driver
nodes.translation: Don't forget to stamp your ticket!
nodes.wrongAnswerResponse: Záchod? To nie je tu... Okompostujte lístok, prosím!
nodes.wrongAnswerTranslation: Bathroom? That's not here... Please stamp your ticket!

choices.translation: Alright, thank you! Where do I get off?
Thank you. What is the next stop?

nodes.speaker: bus_driver
nodes.translation: Do you understand? Transfer at Námestie SNP.
nodes.wrongAnswerResponse: Dovidenia je potom — teraz: rozumiete o prestupe?
nodes.wrongAnswerTranslation: Goodbye is later — now: do you understand about the transfer?

choices.translation: Excuse me — which bus do I take after?

nodes.speaker: bus_driver
nodes.text: Vystúpte na tretej zastávke — Obchodná ulica. Päť minút.
nodes.translation: Get off at the third stop — Obchodná street. Five minutes.

nodes.speaker: bus_driver
nodes.text: Dobre. Na Námestie SNP si pozrite smer — linka 93 na Hlavnú stanicu.
nodes.translation: Good. At Námestie SNP check the direction — line 93 to Main Station.

nodes.speaker: bus_driver
nodes.text: Linka deväťdesiatri — smer Hlavná stanica. Nastúpte na zastávke Námestie SNP.
nodes.translation: Line ninety-three — direction Main Station. Board at Námestie SNP stop.

nodes.speaker: bus_driver
nodes.wrongAnswerResponse: Polícia? Prečo? Toto je vaša zastávka — vystúpte!
nodes.wrongAnswerTranslation: Police? Why? This is your stop — get off!

nodes.speaker: bus_driver
nodes.text: Námestie SNP — nasledujúca zastávka. Vystúpte tu!
nodes.translation: Námestie SNP — next stop. Get off here!
nodes.wrongAnswerResponse: Nemocnica je inde... Teraz vystúpte na Námestie SNP!
nodes.wrongAnswerTranslation: The hospital is elsewhere... Now get off at Námestie SNP!

choices.text: Prepáčte — je to tu zastávka pre linku 93?
choices.translation: Excuse me — is this the stop for line 93?

nodes.speaker: bus_driver
nodes.text: Áno — linka 93 je naproti. Príjemný deň!
nodes.translation: Yes — line 93 is across the road. Have a nice day!

nodes.speaker: bus_driver
nodes.text: Áno, zastávka je tam vpravo. Linka 93 príde za chvíľu!
nodes.translation: Yes, the stop is over there to the right. Line 93 will come shortly!
